overall.description: A spacecraft with glowing purple engines travels at warp speed through deep space, approaching a large crescent planet. Radiating streaks of blue, green, and purple light simulate high-velocity travel in this science fiction game footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space warp corridor approaching crescent planetary body

agents.ego_description: piloting a spacecraft with glowing purple engines through a high-velocity warp tunnel toward a distant crescent planet

entered.detail: Large celestial body with illuminated crescent and textured surface visible in the distance, growing larger as the ship approaches
Radiating lines of blue, green, and purple light streaking outward from the center to simulate faster-than-light travel
Distant stars visible in the blackness of space beyond the colorful light effects

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft maintains a steady course through the warp tunnel, with colorful light streaks radiating outward in all directions. The crescent planet gradually grows larger in the center of the frame as the ship approaches, transitioning from a distant object to a prominent celestial body filling the view.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward trajectory through a warp tunnel that transforms from a void of streaking light into a close-up encounter with a massive celestial body. It begins with the spacecraft maintaining a steady course, surrounded by vibrant blue, green, and purple light streaks radiating outward in all directions. As the ship surges forward, the distant crescent planet in the center of the frame gradually grows in scale. The scene then shifts as the planet expands to dominate the view, transitioning from a small point of light into a prominent celestial body that fills the frame.
